mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, is_active FROM users WHERE username = #{username} AND is_active = 1 LIMIT 1;
SELECT id AS id, email AS email, username AS username, google_auth AS googleId, tele_user_id AS telegramId, password AS password FROM users WHERE email = #{email} AND is_active = 1 LIMIT 1;

SELECT id AS id, email AS email, username AS username, google_auth AS googleId, tele_user_id AS telegramId, password AS password, is_active AS isActive, verification_code AS verificationCode, verification_code_expiry AS verificationCodeExpiry FROM users WHERE email = #{email} AND is_active = 0 LIMIT 1;

SELECT id AS id, email AS email, username AS username, google_auth AS googleId, tele_user_id AS telegramId, password AS password, is_active AS isActive FROM users WHERE email = #{email} AND is_active = 0 LIMIT 1;
SELECT id AS id, email AS email, username AS username, google_auth AS googleId, tele_user_id AS telegramId, password AS password FROM users WHERE google_auth = #{googleId} AND is_active = 1 LIMIT 1;

SELECT id AS id, email AS email, username AS username, google_auth AS googleId, tele_user_id AS telegramId, password AS password FROM users WHERE tele_user_id = #{telegramId} AND is_active = 1 LIMIT 1;
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users ( first_name, last_name, username, email, telephone, sex, address, password, google_auth, tele_user_id ) VALUES ( #{firstName}, #{lastName}, #{username}, #{email}, #{telephone}, #{sex}, #{address}, #{password}, #{googleId}, #{telegramId} )
mapper.select: SELECT refresh_token FROM oauth_access_token WHERE user_name = #{username} AND client_id = #{clientId} LIMIT 1;
SELECT COUNT(id) FROM users WHERE username = #{username} AND is_active = 1;
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO oauth_client_details (client_id, device_info, client_secret, scope, authorized_grant_types, web_server_redirect_uri, authorities, access_token_validity, refresh_token_validity, additional_information, autoapprove, created) VALUES (#{clientId}, #{clientName}, #{clientSecure}, 'read,write,trust', 'password,refresh_token', null, null, #{tokenValidate}, #{refreshTokenValidate}, null, 1, now()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE device_info = #{clientName}, access_token_validity = #{tokenValidate}, refresh_token_validity = #{refreshTokenValidate}, created = now();
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET session_start = NOW(), session_active = NOW() WHERE username = #{username};
